name: Neteller (Paysafe) Digital Wallet API
what_it_does: Neteller (a Paysafe company) digital wallet REST API for forex brokers, online gaming platforms, and e-commerce merchants to accept wallet-to-merchant payments and process payouts to Neteller's 26M+ wallet holders across 200+ countries, with particular strength in regulated gambling, forex, and cross-border payment verticals where Neteller's card-independent payment provides strong conversion. Enables AI agents to manage Neteller payment checkout for wallet payment automation, handle Neteller payout for disbursement automation, access Neteller 1-Tap for one-click mobile payment automation, retrieve Net+ prepaid card top-up for wallet-to-card automation, manage payment status for transaction verification automation, handle refund processing for Neteller payment reversal automation, access account verification for wallet identity automation, retrieve customer balance for wallet account automation, manage webhook notification for payment event automation, and integrate Neteller with forex, gaming, affiliate, and marketplace platforms for end-to-end global wallet payment automation.
use_cases: Accepting Neteller wallet deposits for forex broker and trading platform automation agents
Processing Neteller payouts to affiliate and partner wallet accounts from disbursement agents
Integrating Neteller into online gaming deposit and withdrawal flows from gaming platform agents
Receiving Neteller payments from international consumers for cross-border payment automation agents
not_for: Mainstream retail where cards suffice (Neteller is for alternative payment vertical focus)
Markets where Neteller is not strong (use local wallets for SEA/Africa markets)
Regulated financial services requiring banking license (Neteller is e-money, not bank)
best_when: A forex broker, online gaming platform, or global affiliate network wanting AI agents to accept and pay out through Neteller's 26M+ wallet network across 200+ countries as an alternative to card payment.
avoid_when: RESTRICTED MERCHANT CATEGORIES REQUIRE COMPLIANCE: Neteller serves gambling, forex, crypto which require additional compliance review; automated universal merchant category acceptance creates account suspension for non-approved categories. SESSION-BASED CHECKOUT: Neteller checkout uses a session token; automated payment without initiating session first creates invalid checkout state. PAYOUT TO WALLET IS SEPARATE API: Neteller payout (disbursement) uses separate Paysafe gateway with different credentials from collection API; automated unified payment and payout assumption creates auth failure for payout calls. FX SPREAD ON MULTI-CURRENCY: Neteller applies FX conversion spread; automated at-market-rate assumption creates higher cost than expected for multi-currency transactions.

auth.notes: Neteller uses API key + client token for merchant authentication. REST API with JSON. Isle of Man HQ. Founded 1999. Paysafe Group subsidiary (NYSE: PSFE, acquired 2015). Products: Wallet deposit, payout, Net+ prepaid card, 1-Tap, Neteller VIP. SDKs: None public. FCA-regulated (UK), EU e-money institution. 26M+ wallet holders in 200+ countries. Competes with Skrill (sister company) and PayPal for global alternative payment wallet. Both Neteller and Skrill owned by Paysafe.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox via Paysafe test environment; production requires Neteller merchant account
pricing.paid_tiers: Transaction fee: 2.5% per deposit; payout: 1.45% + fixed fee; FX spread: 3.99%
pricing.notes: Isle of Man. Paysafe (NYSE:PSFE). FCA-regulated. Transaction percentage fees. FX spread on conversion.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per merchant account; webhooks for payment and payout events

known_agent_gotchas: CLIENT TOKEN REQUIRED FOR CHECKOUT: Neteller checkout requires client token generated from API key exchange; automated direct payment without client token creates session_invalid; automated must first exchange API credentials for client token before checkout initiation

PAYOUT API IS SEPARATE FROM DEPOSIT: Neteller payout uses separate Paysafe Payments Hub API with different credentials; automated single-credential payment+payout assumption creates authorization failure for disbursement calls

MERCHANT CATEGORY COMPLIANCE REQUIRED: Neteller serves restricted categories (gambling, forex, crypto); automated assumption of universal acceptance creates account suspension; automated integration requires confirmed Neteller merchant category approval

WEBHOOK STATUS NOTIFICATION IS REQUIRED: Neteller payment confirmation delivered via webhook; automated synchronous payment confirmation creates incomplete payment tracking; automated must consume Neteller webhook for definitive payment status

FX CONVERSION APPLIES AUTOMATICALLY: Neteller converts currency automatically with 3.99% spread; automated no-FX assumption for cross-currency transactions creates unexpected cost; automated must account for FX spread in cross-currency payment calculations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Digital e-money wallet. FCA regulated. GDPR, AML. API key + token. EU/UK. Wallet and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Digital wallet. FCA, GDPR. API key + token. EU/UK. Wallet and payment data.
